article_title: B.C. Reg. 244/2025 – British Columbia Assessment Authority

briefs.title: BC telecom property tax valuation rates updated for 2026 — higher per-unit costs apply
briefs.summary: BC Assessment has updated the rules used to calculate the property value of telecommunications (phone and internet) company infrastructure for 2026. Key dollar amounts have increased: the base rate per unit rises from $640 to $685, and another rate moves from $504 to $539. These higher figures will be used to set property assessments — and therefore property tax bills — for telecom companies in BC.
briefs.article_title: B.C. Reg. 244/2025 – British Columbia Assessment Authority
